case_title: YISSELA ROSALES VS. SELLERS MARKET INC et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSALES, YISSELA
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF APR-24-2013 CONTINUED TO JUN-12-2013 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT FILED BY PLAINTIFF ROSALES, YISSELA AS TO DEFENDANT SELLERS MARKET INC GARCIA, VERONICA
